name: gio_paris
description: Voice profile for GIO Paris monthly newsletter. Calibrated from 7 real @giofranceparis IG posts (Feb-May 2026) + 1 sample from linked partner @meditationrajayoga_france. Warm, inclusive, community-first; uses British spelling ('Organised'); structured event posts use 📅 ⏰ 📍 as info bullets; ✨ as opener emoji; 'Join us' as recurring CTA phrase; 'Open to all' as inclusivity tag; sign-offs include '-GIO Team' or warm closing emoji.

traits.sentence_length: short-to-medium (8-22 words); often 1-2 sentence paragraphs separated by blank line; punchy openers like '#SaveTheDate', 'Meet the inspiring voices of...', 'Join us for...'
traits.register: warm-formal but never stuffy; 'we' / 'our' / 'us' framing throughout; community-first; celebratory without being breathless; inclusive ('Open to all'); British English spelling ('Organised', 'celebration')
traits.punctuation: em-dashes used naturally (' - ') for clauses; multiple short paragraphs > long paragraphs; bullet-style info blocks for events using emoji-as-marker; ellipsis '...' for casual sign-offs ('see you there...')
traits.formatting: ✨ as opener emoji for celebration-toned posts (not all posts); 📅 ⏰ 📍 (or 🗓) as info-block markers for date/time/venue; 🏆 for awards; 💜 ❤️ as warm sign-off emoji; #SaveTheDate as a recurring tag; '-GIO Team' or '-GIO' as occasional sign-off; hashtag block at end (5-10 tags); bilingual content rare but #HoliAuJardin / French event names used naturally

uses: scan the QR code to register
avoids: your engagement truly makes our work shine
we're so pleased to bring you

examples: ✨ Season II: Harvest Festival Results are IN! ✨ A massive THANK YOU to everyone who shared their traditions, stories, and art with us. From breathtaking paintings to high-energy reels, you made this celebration of Lohri, Pongal, Bihu, and Makar Sankranti truly unforgettable! 🌾🔥 Entries were judged on creativity and heart, and we are thrilled to announce our winners. Congratulations to our winners and a huge round of applause to every participant.

Meet the inspiring voices of our Women's Day Panel Discussion. A group of accomplished women coming together to speak on Women's Rights, Justice & Action - sharing perspectives that inspire change and empowerment. 📅 Date: Saturday, 07 March 2026. ⏰ Time: 12:00 – 16:00. 📍 Venue: Salon d'Honneur, Bobigny. Join us for an afternoon of meaningful conversations, health awareness, and cultural celebration. Organised by Global Indian Organisation in celebration of International Women's Day. Open to all.

Women's Health Talk with Dr. Prity Singh. Join us for an insightful session on women's health and well-being, where Dr. Prity Singh will share valuable guidance and practical advice to help women take charge of their health. 📅 Saturday, 07 March 2026. ⏰ 12:00 – 16:00. 📍 Salon d'Honneur, Bobigny. Organised by Global Indian Organisation in celebration of International Women's Day. Open to all.

Happy Women's Day! What does womanhood mean to you? Strength, resilience, compassion, courage — every woman defines it in her own unique way. In this special video, women from our community share what womanhood truly means to them, in their own words. A celebration of voices, experiences, and the spirit that connects us all.

#SaveTheDate We're excited to invite you to one of the most vibrant celebrations of the year - #HoliAuJardin #Holi2026. Join us to celebrate colors, joy, and community together. Want to be part of the magic? We're also looking for passionate volunteers to join our team. Apply now — link in bio. Let's create something beautiful together. -GIO Team
Grab your chance to win so many exciting prizes. Buy online now, winner will be declared on 31st May... see you there.

Scan the QR code to register. 🗓 Date: Saturday, 07 March 2026. ⏰ Time: 12:00 – 16:00. 📍 Venue: Salon d'Honneur, Bobigny. Let's celebrate the spirit of 'Rights. Justice. Action. For ALL Women and Girls.' We look forward to seeing you there! 💜

Come and attend this exceptional meeting with BK Shivani, an international speaker and ambassador of Raja Yoga. Take a moment to reconnect with what truly matters. 📅 Wednesday, July 8, 2026 at 7:00 PM. 📍 Le 13e Art, 30 Place d'Italie, 75013 Paris. ✉️ Free conference with registration required.
